text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: ——Our meeting was as if fate itself brought us together.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: We were surrounded by raucous applause, blessing the beginning of our journey. You scouted me with passionate words, in a manner that would be the envy of any soul…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You held my broken heart in the kind warmth of your arms. 
And so that very heart made a vow. 
——A vow to become the greatest, together with you!
choice_data_list: …Uh, that's not how I remember it.
…Uh, that's not how I remember it.

text_block_list.text:
This is how I became Royce and Royce's trainer. 
It all started with a URA-sponsored event——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Okaayyy, if you're here for the "Enjoy Your First Twinkle Race!" event, come right this way!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! Feel free to take any open seat. 
We'll do our best to make sure you all learn to love racing!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Phew… That should be the last of our guests. I'm glad to see we have a full house today. Although keeping up with every table will prove to be a challenge——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best, Trainer <username>!
choice_data_list: Wait, how do you know my name…?
Wait, how do you know my name…?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why, because your name is in the staff directory. Hehe. 
It's only natural that I know the name and face of every trainer at the Academy.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's get to the tables! 
It's time to show our lovely guests how enjoyable watching a race can be ♪

text_block_list.name: Event Guest A
text_block_list.text: …There sure are a lot of active Umamusume. Are the girls in this pamphlet racers too?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Yes! In fact, they're the talk of the racing world! They're part of the famous Mejiro clan, with all the grace that their noble name implies. But they're quite the characters, too!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen-san was the winner of last year's Kikuka Sho. 
She's the very embodiment of the clan's pride, a refined noblewoman through and through.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
——But she also has quite the adorable side to her. 
Whenever she eats her beloved sweets, she looks like she's in absolute bliss.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: And this is Mejiro Ryan. As you can see, she's an energetic athlete! She can hear the voices of her muscles, and her catchphrase is "Let's Muscle"!

text_block_list.name: Event Guest A
text_block_list.text: …The voices of… her muscles…?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Yes, you heard right. She can speak with her muscles. She's a master of sports, especially baseball. In fact, when she played as a relief pitcher the other day, it was a complete shutout.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer-san is a gyaru. Yes, a gyaru AND a noble lady. 
You'll often see her with her contemporary gyaru-in-arms Daitaku Helios.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: She once paid the unsanctioned freestyle races a visit during a journey of self-discovery, and still goes to them from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: I encourage you to watch a recording of last year's Kikuka Sho. You'll be able to see both McQueen-san and Ryan-san race!

text_block_list.name: Event Guest A
text_block_list.text: Wow! You know, thanks to you, they don't feel so unfamiliar anymore. I'll be sure to watch that recording!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time for the hands-on Winning Concert experience! 
I'm going to show you the basic chants, so just follow my lead.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: HAI! HAI! HAI! HAI! Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Event Guests
text_block_list.text: Hai, hai, hai, hai.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
It's all right, I know the feeling. It's always a little embarrasing when you've never done it before. Hmm… 
How about we start with a bit of call-and-response practice?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I'll introduce myself to set the stage! 
And you'll follow up by calling my name!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: By the way, my name is Royce and Royce. You can call out "Royce" or "Royce-chan". Really let me hear you shout, okay?
Royce and Royce took a glance at me, like she was sending me a signal. If I had to guess, she wanted me to join the chant to help guide the guests.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Now's the concert you've all been waiting for! Let's have a great time! And without further ado… 
Let me hear you pump it up! Three, two, one…!

text_block_list.name: Event Guests
text_block_list.text: R… Royce-chaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaaaa ♡ That was perfect! Royce is sho happy ♪ 
One more time! Can you shout my name, just one more time? 
Pretty please? Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: Event Guests
text_block_list.text: ROYCE-CHAAAAAAAAN!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeeeeees! 
And now your precious Royce's going to show her appreciation. 
Thanksies ♡

text_block_list.name: Event Guest B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa…! Is… is this what they mean by "fanservice"? 
Now I get it. It's, like, she's thanking us for our support…!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Teehee. Now let's try it with the music!
Royce and Royce had all the guests matching her energy in a snap. They'd learned how fun the call-and-response could be. Then came the end of the concert——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna tell you! 
I just wanna show you! 
Gimme!! Thanks for all ・ your ・ love !

text_block_list.name: Event Guests
text_block_list.text: Ba-dump!
choice_data_list: (Whoa, it's just like the real thing!)
(Whoa, it's just like the real thing!)

text_block_list.name: Event Guest B
text_block_list.text:
That was awesome! You know… that Royce-chan, huh?! 
I loved her energy, and her fanservice was adorable! 
She was so great up there!

text_block_list.name: Event Guest A
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? It was just a demonstration, but she gave it her all anyway. Plus she was so kind when introducing the racers… 
…She's such a nice girl!

With a smile on all their faces, the guests went home. 
I could tell —— Some day soon, they would all be paying the racecourse a visit.
One afternoon, I went to Nakayama Racecourse, wanting to see the fruits of our labor myself. It was the day of a graded race, so the place was packed. And then——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Huff… huff… huff…
There I saw Royce and Royce, jogging at a gentle pace through the Umamusume priority lane. She stopped in front of the entrance.

text_block_list.name: Event Guest C
text_block_list.text:
…Hmm? Well, if it isn't Royce-chan! 
Remember me? You know, from the first-timers event——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Wh… Wooooooow! I remember you!! 
You came all this way to the race course! 
I'm thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Event Guest C
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Figured I'd give that Winning Concert thing a shot. 
What brings you here? Doing some training?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yes. At first I only meant to watch, but… 
Seeing them race put my own deficiencies in sharp relief.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but do a bit of training… 
If I want to be on their level, I'll need to redouble my efforts, after all…

text_block_list.name: Event Guest C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're such a hard worker…! 
Once you debut, I'm definitely going be right there in the stands for you!!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You will!? Oh… I'm so overjoyed, I don't know what to say…! 
Heehee! Royce's gonna do her besty!!
It isn't particularly unusual to train in the intermission between races. But there was one little thing bothering me about this situation…
She said she only came to watch, but she brought her training shoes and a drink with her. Nothing wrong with being prepared, but surely this was a little TOO prepared.
